headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Paycom Software, Lowers Price Target to $148
summary: Barclays  analyst Raimo Lenschow   maintains Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $150 to $148.

headline: Nasdaq 100 Climbs Records, Oil Extends Drop As Iran Weighs Hormuz Deal: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. stocks drifted near records Thursday as oil slipped on Iran-Hormuz peace hopes. Coinbase, Airbnb and CoreWeave on deck after the close.
